input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation says YAML, JSON, TOML, and HOCON resource files require separate format modules; generated tests should avoid those formats unless the workflow intentionally adds a format dependency.
The 3.0.0 line changes environment-variable handling, so env-var-specific tests may be brittle if they rely on process environment mutation rather than controlled core sources.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves with only Kotlin/coroutines runtime dependencies and includes core decoders, property sources, and the built-in .properties parser, so meaningful native-image coverage is reachable without adding setup.
